# AIM Foundation - Comprehensive Directory

## Mission and Vision
AIM Foundation (Associated Initiative for Mankind Foundation) is committed to uplifting the marginalized through targeted interventions in health, education, and social development.

## Detailed Initiatives

### Education & Childcare
- **Innocent Smiles**: Nurturing creativity through art, dance, and music alongside academics.
- **EduAccess**: Expert-led online classes for rural West Bengal.
- **Empower English**: Spoken English training for confidence and opportunity.
- **DigiEmpower**: Hands-on computer training for underprivileged and Adivasi children.
- **Milieu**: Connecting children across socio-economic backgrounds to build empathy.
- **VidyaShakti**: Multilingual AI app providing instant learning support for rural students.

### Healthcare
- **CureLine**: Rural medical outreach in remote villages and Sundarbans.
- **CareCircle**: Urban health camps for marginalized populations in Kolkata.
- **ChildFirst**: Dedicated paediatric care for children in red-light districts.
- **Detect**: Cervical cancer screening and awareness for rural women.
- **SightHope**: Free eye care, screenings, and cataract surgeries.
- **OralScan**: Free oral cancer screening camps.
- **CycleSafe**: Menstrual hygiene support and education for adolescent girls.
- **SoulCircle**: 24/7 AI-powered mental health support.

### Sustainability
- **GreenRoots**: Decentralized reforestation through community sapling distribution.
- **TideShield**: Mangrove restoration on Bali Island, Sundarbans.
- **Roots of Change**: Environmental education and awareness workshops.
- **Forest Cleaning**: Volunteer-led drives to remove waste from natural habitats.

### Women Empowerment
- **SuiDhaga**: Vocational training in tailoring and embroidery.
- **Krishti**: Production and marketing support for women entrepreneurs.

## Organizational Services
- **Impact Assessment**: Independent third-party evaluation of CSR projects.
- **CSR Reporting**: Comprehensive reporting services aligned with statutory norms.

## Governance & Transparency
AIM Foundation is a registered Public Charitable Trust. We maintain 100% transparency through annual audits and public disclosures.
- [Policies](https://aimindia.org.in/policies)
- [Financial Reports](https://aimindia.org.in/profile#financial-reports)

## Join the Movement
- [Volunteering](https://aimindia.org.in/volunteering)
- [Internship](https://aimindia.org.in/internship)
- [Careers](https://aimindia.org.in/career)
